title: Sequencing data from the article "Evaluation of Phaseolus vulgaris lec- lpa as alternative protein source on growth performances, health status, faecal minerals and gut microbiota in weaned piglet's diet"
author: Biscarini, Filippo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: 16S rRNA-gene sequencing data (metataxonomics) of 42 gut microbiota samples from 14 piglets (3 timepoints). In this repository, you will find 84 files, two per sample (paired-end sequencing).
steps_raw: 16S rRNA-gene sequencing data (metataxonomics) of 42 gut microbiota samples from 14 piglets (3 timepoints). In this repository, you will find 84 files, two per sample (paired-end sequencing).
